name: Bonum Coaching
description: Developer of a coaching platform designed for the development of leaders and companies. The company offers an executive coach, leadership evaluations that allow measuring progress towards the objectives set and coaching services that grow with the organization and adapt to all employees, enabling companies to improve results by developing employees and aligning with the values of the organization.

name: Mujer Financiera
description: Developer of a financial social network platform designed to close the gender gap in financial inclusion for women through education and community. The company's platform helps women develop their financial skills so that they can make the best financial decisions for themselves and their families' well-being with the help of a data profiling model which identifies the right content for each woman to directly impact finances, enabling women to be better equipped to connect with banks and fintech to acquire financial services according to their needs.

name: Picker
description: Operator of a logistics technology platform intended to build tools to connect e-commerce businesses with all kinds of logistics providers. The company's platform offers services such as application programming interface delivery, application programming interface routes and application programming interface pickups, enabling businesses to connect with multiple delivery fleets that expand their coverage and reduce logistics expenses.

name: Sioma
description: Developer of a precision agriculture system designed to help farmers increase their productivity. The company's system helps to know and increase the area traveled by workers in the field, and helps to carry the inventory of bunches automatically, offers an integrated control system that allows organizing the exact boxes that are going to export in such a way that they are not overweight, enabling users to improve the internal processes of their crops.

name: Wombo
description: Operator of a training and coaching platform intended to encourage community gaming. The company's platform creates an environment that brings together online players in the same learning environment and fans wanting to increase their in-game performance and compete with their peers, and pro players wanting to monetize their experience and knowledge through coaching, enabling gamers access courses, personalized coaching and other experiences with esports experts and watch and enjoy various sports and games.
